name: Panasonic Lumix S5 II Mirrorless Camera
description: Designed for content creators needing strong stills and video performance, the second-generation Panasonic Lumix S5 II Mirrorless Camera is equipped with a host of new features to bring your vision to life.

features.Key Features:: 24.2MP Full-Frame CMOS Sensor | 6K30p 4:2:0 10-Bit Video Recording | C4K/4K60p 4:2:2 10-Bit Unlimited | 3.68m-Dot 0.78x-Magnification OLED LVF | 3.0" 1.84m-Dot Tilt/Free-Angle Touch-LCD | 779-Point Phase-Detection AF System | 5-Axis Sensor-Shift Image Stabilization | ISO 100-51200, up to 30 fps Shooting | Dual UHS-II SD Slots; Wi-Fi & Bluetooth | Weather-Sealed Construction
features.What’s in the box?: 1x Panasonic Lumix S5 II Body Only | 1x Body Cap | 1x Hot Shoe Cover | 1x Cover for the Battery Grip Connector | 1x Shoulder Strap | 1x Battery Pack | 1x AC Adaptor | 1x USB Connection Cable (A-C) | 1x Manual Book | 1x Kartu Garansi Resmi
